name: Peanut Lime Dipping Sauce- Midsummer Thai Dinner
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Chinese chili sauce or 1/4 ts dried chili flakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Use either chunky or smooth peanut butter. If you don't like peanut sauce, try the "Tart Sweet Sauce - Midsummer Thai Dinner" recipe.
2. Add peanut butter to a small bowl.
3. Slowly whisk in the remaining ingredients.
